subcodes.first_line: O thou divine Physician! From the beginning of the world to this day there has been in the world two classes of physicians
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حکیم الهی از بدایت تاریخ تا یومنا هذا در دنیا دو صنف طبیبان موجود اطبای
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
